query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A view through stacked horizontal bands or slats showing four dark triangular silhouettes against an orange-to-pink gradient sky at dusk or dawn. The triangular shapes appear to be distant architectural spires or monuments. Warm orange and amber tones dominate the lower and middle sections, with cooler pale tones at the top edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An intentionally blurred photograph viewed through stacked horizontal bands or slats, showing four dark triangular silhouettes of distant spires or monuments against an orange-to-pink gradient sky at dusk or dawn. The motion blur creates sweeping horizontal streaks across the entire frame, dissolving edges and details into soft flowing bands of warm amber, orange, and pale tones that abstract the scene into color and gesture rather than crisp representation.
